title: DENTAL SERVICES - 211info
text: ADVANTAGE DENTAL+ PENDLETON DENTAL SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Full-service private dental practice. Services include sealants and fluoride treatments, cleanings, cosmetic dentistry, dentures, dental restoration, emergency care, root canals, pediatric care, surgery, and periodontics. Services may vary by location. 310 SE 2nd Street Suite 203 Pendleton, OR 97801 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 276-4768 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 276-4768 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Varies by service. Accepts most insurance plans, including Oregon Health Plan (OHP). DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish by arrangement AREA SERVED: Morrow and Umatilla Counties Services: Cavity Prevention Measures Cosmetic Dentistry Dental Hygiene Dental Prosthodontics Dental Restoration Emergency Dental Care Endodontics General Dentistry Oral/Maxillofacial Surgery Pediatric Dentistry Periodontics If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
